description: Installs GitHub Desktop via Chocolatey. Optionally scans folders for Git repos and adds them to GitHub Desktop.

messages.ghDesktopNotFound: GitHub Desktop not found, installing via Chocolatey...
messages.scriptDisabled: GitHub Desktop installation is disabled in config.
messages.scanDisabled: Folder scanning is disabled in config -- skipping repo discovery
messages.scanSummary: Scan complete -- {found} repos found, {added} newly added, {skipped} already tracked
messages.scanNoRepos: No Git repositories found in configured folders
messages.scanWriteError: Failed to write GitHub Desktop repo list: {error}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.all: Install/upgrade GitHub Desktop + scan folders for repos (default)
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
